\tzpentry{ID5565}{Spectral Gap Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5565 introduces Spectral Gap Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \Delta_{ij} = \abs{\Omega_i - \Omega_j}. \end{equation}
